text:
Olympic hammer throw champion Wojciech Nowicki cannot wait to get his season up and running at today's Kip Keino Classic at Nyayo Stadium.Nowicki said he is looking forward to an excellent outcome at the competition as he prepares to defend his title at the Paris Games in the summer.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Nowicki to use Kip Keino Classic to prepare for Olympics
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: Nowicki is returning to Kenya for the fourth time.
keywords: ["Wojciech Nowicki","Kip Keino Classic","Olympic champion","Hammer throw champion"]
